SpaGene
=======

# Available modules


The overview below shows which SpaGene installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using SpaGene, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load SpaGene/0.1.0-2023-06-04-foss-2025a-R-4.5.1
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
